subject: Fwd: Specialist?
body:
This came from Dave Christopher.  Do you have an endocrinologist that  you 
can recommend who might be familiary with Hashimoto's Disease?
 
Darren K.  Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New  York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: _dkiesq@aol.com_ (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

From: ddac94@aol.com
Subject: Specialist?
Date: Sun, 06 Apr 2008 14:09:47 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com

HI Darren

How are you? Michelle? Girls??

 Do you or Jeff know of any real specialist in the Endocronology field in NJ/NY?? They need to deal specifically with Hashimoto's Disease.

I?am at such a loss and do not know what to do anymore.

I am so sorry to bother you with this.
Thanks so much,
Denise
